title: Runtime Profile Config
description: FR-VID-12 §4 Stage 1 — Declares which extensions, tool policies, and agent types apply in a runtime session. Profiles are resolved deterministically before any agent or tool execution begins.

profile_id.description: Unique profile identifier. One of the five canonical runtime profiles.

description.description: Human-readable description of the profile's purpose and scope.

mandatory_extensions.description: Extensions that must be loaded before the primary agent takes its first turn. Missing mandatory extension aborts the command.

tool_policy_id.description: Reference to the DEP-RUN-004 tool policy file that governs allowed tool categories for this profile.

allowed_agent_types.description: Agent types permitted to operate under this profile.

memory_domains.description: Memory domains this profile is allowed to write to.

write_scopes.description: Glob patterns declaring filesystem write scopes for agents running under this profile.
